description: indxr accuracy benchmark: measures LLM answer quality with full-file context vs indxr structural context

questions.question: In which file is the function `estimate_tokens` defined? Give the relative path from the project root.
questions.ground_truth: src/budget.rs

questions.question: What is the full function signature of `handle_tool_call`? Include all parameters and return type.
questions.ground_truth: pub(super) fn handle_tool_call(workspace: &WorkspaceIndex, name: &str, args: &Value) -> Value

questions.question: What struct represents a single file in the codebase index? Give the struct name and the file where it's defined.
questions.ground_truth: FileIndex, defined in src/model/mod.rs

questions.question: What are all the variants of the `DeclKind` enum?
questions.ground_truth: Function, Struct, Enum, Trait, Impl, Constant, Static, TypeAlias, Module, Class, Field, Variant, Method, Interface, Namespace, Macro, ConfigKey, Property, Other

questions.question: Which files import from `src/mcp/helpers.rs`? List the relative file paths.
questions.ground_truth: src/mcp/tools.rs, src/mcp/tests.rs

questions.question: What are the import statements in `src/indexer.rs`? List the crate-level imports (starting with `crate::`).
questions.ground_truth: crate::cache::Cache, crate::model::*, crate::output::*, crate::parser::ParserRegistry, crate::walker, crate::workspace

questions.question: Which files import the `Declaration` type? List the relative file paths.
questions.ground_truth: Files that import Declaration include src/mcp/tools.rs, src/mcp/helpers.rs, src/filter.rs, src/budget.rs, src/diff.rs, src/dep_graph.rs

questions.question: What does the `tool_error` function do? Describe its input, output, and purpose.
questions.ground_truth: Takes a string message, returns a JSON Value with isError: true and a text content block containing the error message

questions.question: What is the token estimation formula used by `estimate_tokens`? How does it convert characters to tokens?
questions.ground_truth: Divides character count by 4 (text.len().div_ceil(4)), approximating 1 token as 4 characters

questions.question: In the `apply_token_budget` function, what are the progressive truncation stages in order? List each stage briefly.
questions.ground_truth: 1) Truncate long doc comments to first line, 2) Strip all doc comments, 3) Remove private declarations, 4) Remove children from declarations, 5) Drop least-important files

questions.question: How many public functions are defined in `src/mcp/tools.rs`?
questions.ground_truth: Around 24 public symbols

questions.question: How many files are in the `src/parser/queries/` directory? List their names.
questions.ground_truth: 9 files: mod.rs, rust.rs, python.rs, javascript.rs, typescript.rs, go.rs, java.rs, c.rs, cpp.rs

questions.question: How many struct declarations are in `src/mcp/helpers.rs`?
questions.ground_truth: 4 structs: SymbolMatch, SignatureMatch, ShallowDeclaration, RelevanceMatch

questions.question: Which functions reference `estimate_tokens` in their signature or body? List the function names and their files.
questions.ground_truth: Functions that call estimate_tokens

questions.question: Which functions produce (return) a `WorkspaceIndex`? List function names and files.
questions.ground_truth: Functions that return WorkspaceIndex

questions.question: What are the top-level modules inside `src/`? List the directory names and standalone .rs files (excluding main.rs).
questions.ground_truth: cache/, model/, mcp/, output/, parser/, walker/, and standalone files: cli.rs, indexer.rs, budget.rs, filter.rs, diff.rs, github.rs, languages.rs, watch.rs, workspace.rs, init.rs, error.rs, utils.rs, dep_graph.rs

questions.question: What output formats does indxr support? List them.
questions.ground_truth: Markdown, JSON, YAML

questions.question: What caching mechanism does indxr use? Describe the cache key strategy.
questions.ground_truth: Binary cache using mtime + xxh3 hash as cache key/fingerprint

questions.question: What are the public functions exported from `src/budget.rs`? List their names and signatures.
questions.ground_truth: estimate_tokens(text: &str) -> usize, apply_token_budget(index: &mut CodebaseIndex, max_tokens: usize)

questions.question: What fields does the `IndexConfig` struct have? List them with their types.
questions.ground_truth: root: PathBuf, config: Config, exclude: Vec<String>, languages: Vec<String>, no_gitignore: bool, max_file_size: u64
